header.description: Generates an action plan and executes it. Can use external tools.

aiAgentStarterCallout.displayName: Tip: Get a feel for agents with our quick tutorial or see an example of how this node works

deprecated.displayName: This node is using Agent that has been deprecated. Please switch to using 'Tools Agent' instead.

conversationalAgent.description: Describes tools in the system prompt and parses JSON responses for tool calls. More flexible but potentially less reliable than the Tools Agent. Suitable for simpler interactions or with models not supporting structured schemas.

openAiFunctionsAgent.description: Leverages OpenAI's function calling capabilities to precisely select and execute tools. Excellent for tasks requiring structured outputs when working with OpenAI models.

planAndExecuteAgent.description: Creates a high-level plan for complex tasks and then executes each step. Suitable for multi-stage problems or when a strategic approach is needed.

reActAgent.description: Combines reasoning and action in an iterative process. Effective for tasks that require careful analysis and step-by-step problem-solving.

sqlAgent.description: Specializes in interacting with SQL databases. Ideal for data analysis tasks, generating queries, or extracting insights from structured data.

toolsAgent.description: Utilizes structured tool schemas for precise and reliable tool selection and execution. Recommended for complex tasks requiring accurate and consistent tool usage, but only usable with models that support tool calling.

auto.description: Looks for an input field called 'chatInput' that is coming from a directly connected Chat Trigger

guardrails.description: Looks for an input field called 'guardrailsInput' that is coming from a directly connected Guardrails Node

define.description: Use an expression to reference data in previous nodes or enter static text

text.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

notice.displayName: Connect an output parser on the canvas to specify the output format you require

systemMessage.description: The message that will be sent to the agent before the conversation starts

maxIterations.description: The maximum number of iterations the agent will run before stopping

returnIntermediateSteps.description: Whether or not the output should include intermediate steps the agent took

passthroughBinaryImages.description: Whether or not binary images should be automatically passed through to the agent as image type messages

humanMessage.description: The message that will provide the agent with a list of tools to use

humanMessageTemplate.description: The message that will be sent to the agent during each step execution

prefix.description: String to put before the list of tools

suffixChat.description: String to put after the list of tools that will be used if chat model is used

suffix.description: String to put after the list of tools that will be used if regular model is used

ignoredTables.description: Comma-separated list of tables to ignore from the database. If empty, no tables are ignored.

includedSampleRows.description: Number of sample rows to include in the prompt to the agent. It helps the agent to understand the schema of the database but it also increases the amount of tokens used.

includedTables.description: Comma-separated list of tables to include in the database. If empty, all tables are included.

prefixPrompt.description: Prefix prompt to use for the agent

suffixPrompt.description: Suffix prompt to use for the agent

topK.description: The maximum number of results to return

sqlite.description: Use SQLite by connecting a database file as binary input

sqLiteFileNotice.displayName: Pass the SQLite database into this node as binary data, e.g. by inserting a 'Read/Write Files from Disk' node beforehand
